title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating a multi-agent travel planning system built with LangGraph. The system uses four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, and response) that coordinate via LangGraph to handle real-time flight data and hotel searches.
